strategy_definitions.A_Sprinter: Minimal-location play: locks to hollow, brews starter ingredient continuously, buys machine #2 first, hires all workers. Zero exploration; pure throughput.
strategy_definitions.B_Completionist: Unlocks locations cheapest-first, spreads all workers across the full map, rotates machines onto unseen recipes. Token spend prioritises slots for wider recipe access.
strategy_definitions.C_Industrialist: Builds all 5 machines as fast as possible. Assigns 40% of workers as auto-clickers. Ignores quests. Token spend: clicker power then brew speed.
strategy_definitions.D_QuestHunter: Bootstraps discovery (Completionist) until quests unlock, then pivots every machine/worker toward the cheapest-by-quantity active quest. Sells only non-quest potions.
strategy_definitions.E_AchievementHunter: Chases mach_5 (250k coins), work_8 (100k), loc_30 (5 tokens). Aggressively rotates recipes for disc_* rewards. Watches for volatile ingredients to attempt the secret voidsoup brew. Token spend: slots first (variety) then auto-clicker speed (secret_clickspeed).
strategy_definitions.F_Everyman: Every 10 in-game minutes, rolls for a mode using the game's own seeded RNG: ~40% gold-max (Sprinter), ~25% explorer (Completionist), ~20% quester (if quests active), ~15% achiever (if within 20% of a threshold). The same RNG drives ingredient drops, so mode switches correlate with current supply — creating emergent, unique-per-run playstyles within a consistent framework.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: All 5 machines online at 96% average utilisation — maximum factory throughput, earning 71k.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: Predominantly gold-maximiser (40% of mode rolls). This run outperformed the strategy median by 0% — a clear demonstration that RNG mode selection creates distinct emergent trajectories within the same player archetype.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: Achievement blitz — 4 milestones unlocked, first at 22m, earning 12k bonus coins (95% of total income from achievement rewards alone).

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: Machine #2 at 163m. Simple-recipe throughput compounded quickly, reaching 148k — specialised depth beating exploration breadth here.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: Top performer: 427k coins, 304 potions, 40 quests, 7 achievements.

featured_runs.label: Standout run
featured_runs.story: 164 potions discovered with 21 locations unlocked; the variety pipeline drove consistent quest generation and 6 achievements en route to 15k.

recipe_analysis.note: Achievable potions from real ingredient combinations. Enumerates all distinct 1-3 ingredient recipes, single-ingredient repeats 2-5x, and distinct 4-ingredient recipes among the 30 highest-value ingredients.
